description: Fast, easy and reliable testing for anything in a browser.

option.name: --size
tip: Used with the list command to show the sizes of the cached folders.

next.name: path
tip: Print the path to the binary cache.

next.name: prune
tip: Deletes all cached binaries except for the version currently in use.

next.name: install
tip: Installs the Cypress executable matching this package's version.

next.name: open
tip: Opens Cypress in the interactive GUI.

option.name: --browser
tip: Runs Cypress in the browser with the given name. If a filesystem path is supplied, Cypress will attempt to use the browser at that path.

option.name: --config
tip: Sets configuration values. Separate multiple values with a comma. Overrides any value in cypress.config.{js,ts,mjs,cjs}.

option.name: --config-file
tip: Path to script file where configuration values are set. Defaults to "cypress.config.{js,ts,mjs,cjs}".

option.name: --detached
tip: Runs Cypress application in detached mode.

option.name: --env
tip: Sets environment variables. Separate multiple values with a comma. Overrides any value in cypress.config.{js,ts,mjs,cjs} or cypress.env.json.

option.name: --expose
tip: Sets exposed public configuration variables. Separate multiple values with a comma. Overrides any value in cypress.config.{js,ts,mjs,cjs}.

option.name: --global
tip: Force Cypress into global mode as if it were globally installed.

option.name: --port
tip: Runs Cypress on a specific port. Overrides any value in cypress.config.{js,ts,mjs,cjs}.

next.name: run
tip: Runs Cypress tests from the CLI without the GUI.

option.name: --auto-cancel-after-failures
tip: Overrides the project-level Cloud configuration to set the failed test threshold for auto cancellation or to disable auto cancellation when recording to the Cloud.

option.name: --browser
tip: Runs Cypress in the browser with the given name. If a filesystem path is supplied, Cypress will attempt to use the browser at that path.

option.name: --ci-build-id
tip: The unique identifier for a run on your CI provider. Typically a "BUILD_ID" env var. This value is automatically detected for most CI providers.

option.name: --config
tip: Sets configuration values. Separate multiple values with a comma. Overrides any value in cypress.config.{js,ts,mjs,cjs}.

option.name: --config-file
tip: Path to script file where configuration values are set. Defaults to "cypress.config.{js,ts,mjs,cjs}".

option.name: --env
tip: Sets environment variables. Separate multiple values with a comma. Overrides any value in cypress.config.{js,ts,mjs,cjs} or cypress.env.json.

option.name: --expose
tip: Sets exposed public configuration variables. Separate multiple values with a comma. Overrides any value in cypress.config.{js,ts,mjs,cjs}.

option.name: --group
tip: A named group for recorded runs in Cypress Cloud.

option.name: --headed
tip: Displays the browser instead of running headlessly.

option.name: --headless
tip: Hide the browser instead of running headed. Default for cypress run.

option.name: --key
tip: Your secret Record Key. You can omit this if you set a CYPRESS_RECORD_KEY environment variable.

option.name: --no-exit
tip: Keep the browser open after tests finish.

option.name: --parallel
tip: Enables concurrent runs and automatic load balancing of specs across multiple machines or processes.

option.name: --pass-with-no-tests
tip: Pass when no tests are found.

option.name: --port
tip: Runs Cypress on a specific port. Overrides any value in cypress.config.{js,ts,mjs,cjs}.

option.name: --posix-exit-codes
tip: Use POSIX exit codes for error handling.

option.name: --quiet
tip: Run quietly, using only the configured reporter.

option.name: --record
tip: Records the run. Sends test results, screenshots and videos to Cypress Cloud.

option.name: --reporter
tip: Runs a specific mocha reporter. Pass a path to use a custom reporter. Defaults to "spec".

option.name: --reporter-options
tip: Options for the mocha reporter. Defaults to "null".

option.name: --spec
tip: Runs specific spec file(s). Defaults to "all".

option.name: --tag
tip: Named tag(s) for recorded runs in Cypress Cloud.

next.name: verify
tip: Verifies that Cypress is installed correctly and executable.
